layer.description: specifies a layer to use in the GDB

id.description: unique identifier for the centerline segment

oneway.description: traffic directionality: 'yes' (one-way in digitized direction), 'reverse' (one-way against digitized direction), or 'no' (two-way)

classification.description: functional road classification. Values: motorway (controlled-access highway), trunk (major non-motorway road), primary (major route), secondary (secondary route), tertiary (minor connecting road), residential (residential street), service (service road, alley, driveway), unclassified (other public road)

addr_from_left.description: starting address number on the left side of the segment

addr_to_left.description: ending address number on the left side of the segment

addr_from_right.description: starting address number on the right side of the segment

addr_to_right.description: ending address number on the right side of the segment

zip_left.description: postal code on the left side of the segment

zip_right.description: postal code on the right side of the segment
